summary: Completed comprehensive testing of resizable layout implementation using react-resizable-panels library. All core functionality working correctly including horizontal and vertical panel resizing, proper layout structure, and navigation.

design_issues.issue: autoSaveId localStorage persistence not detected during testing
design_issues.details: Layout changes are applied correctly but may not persist across page reloads. This could be due to timing of localStorage saves or specific key naming.

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with complete resizable panel layout
Left panel (Strategy Config) displays AI Mode selector, model dropdowns, prop firm selector, and strategy input
Center panel (Code Editor) displays Monaco editor with action buttons (validate, download, inject safety)
Right panel (Pipeline Logs) displays collaboration logs container
Bottom panel (Bot Validation) displays all 5 tabs (Bot Validation, Quality Gates, Competition, Summary, Prop Score)
All panels are visible and properly positioned without overlap or gaps
Horizontal resizing works correctly between left/center/right panels
Vertical resizing works correctly between top and bottom sections
Navigation to Portfolio page works correctly
Tab switching in bottom panel works correctly
All interactive elements (AI mode selection, dropdowns, text input) function properly
Panel dimensions change correctly when resized (tested with 50px drag operations)
Resize handles are properly detected and functional
Layout maintains proper proportions after resizing
